children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read and parse input data from source into raw_data store
children.behavior: Accepts input JSON, extracts source, reads data, parses it, and writes to raw_data store. Logs the operation.
postconditions: raw_data store populated with ingested records

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child writes parsed data to raw_data store

outputs.name: ingest_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records count

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformations to data in raw_data and write to processed_data
children.behavior: Reads from raw_data, applies transformation rules (e.g., mapping, cleaning), writes transformed records to processed_data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads raw data for transformation
child writes transformed data to processed_data store

outputs.name: transform_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and records transformed

children.name: ValidateQuality
children.purpose: Check quality of transformed data and mark valid/invalid records
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, applies validation rules (e.g., schema, range), updates processed_data with validity flags. Logs the operation.
postconditions: processed_data store has validity flags set

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads processed_data for validation and updates it with validity flags

outputs.name: validate_result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, valid count, invalid count

children.name: ExportResults
children.purpose: Export only valid records from processed_data to output
children.behavior: Reads from processed_data, filters for valid records, formats output JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data. Logs the operation.

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: child reads processed_data to filter valid records for export

outputs.name: output
outputs.description: JSON with success, records_processed, errors, data

dataflow_edges.note: parent passes input to IngestData for ingestion
parent passes input to TransformData as trigger
parent passes input to ValidateQuality as trigger
parent passes input to ExportResults as trigger
ExportResults returns final output to parent

interface_audit.identity_preservation_detail: All four child names (IngestData, TransformData, ValidateQuality, ExportResults) are preserved exactly as in Stage 1. No children were added, deleted, renamed, or reordered.
interface_audit.semantic_preservation_detail: All Stage 1 fields (purpose, behavior, boundary, semantic_inputs, semantic_outputs, preconditions, postconditions, guarantees, composition_role) are copied verbatim. No semantic changes were introduced.
interface_audit.call_signature_detail: Each child's signature contains only call_inputs parameters. IngestData receives 'input' dict. The other three receive a trigger dict. These are the only parameters the parent passes. Internal resources (raw_data, processed_data) are excluded from signatures.
interface_audit.internal_leaf_separation_detail: Internal leaf accesses (raw_data, processed_data) are listed separately under internal_leaf_accesses. They are not included in call_inputs because they are implementation details of the child, not parameters the parent needs to provide. The parent only needs to trigger the child; the child accesses the data stores internally.
interface_audit.dataflow_schema_detail: All dataflow edges use valid endpoints: from_node and to_node are either 'parent' or exact child names (IngestData, TransformData, ValidateQuality, ExportResults). No resource/store names (raw_data, processed_data) appear as endpoints. Edges correctly represent parent passing input to children and children returning results to parent.
